subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O Lord my God! The eyes of them that have nearaccess to Thee have shed their tears in their separation from Thee
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی قد بکت عیون المقربین فی فراقک و ارتفع صریخ المخلصین فی
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayer for protection, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
